strengths: 20+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling, demonstrating active builder credibility in agentic AI
Founder-operator track record (GISCollective, 2016–present) shows entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership beyond pure IC execution
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field; the preferred academic qualification is absent
AI depth is recent (post-April 2025) and infrastructure-oriented — no demonstrated strategic AI product leadership, platform ownership at scale, or recognized external AI thought leadership

Resume is weighted toward senior/staff IC execution; the role is a Director-level IC requiring strategic customer advisory, cross-org influence, and C-suite engagement — little evidence of that pattern
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, broadly experienced engineer with genuine AI tooling work and entrepreneurial background, but the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer in AI Strategy — a profile that demands recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms at scale, external thought leadership, and the ability to advise strategic customers at an executive level. The AI experience is real but nascent and infrastructure-scoped, the resume shows no evidence of strategic advisory relationships or large-org influence, and the preferred advanced degree is absent. The foundation is there for growth toward this profile, but the current gap to the stated requirements is meaningful enough to warrant caution.
